description_long: This object is a rustic wooden cabin complex, featuring two main gable-roofed structures with plank siding and simple rectangular forms. The set includes a wooden windmill with a ladder, two utility poles with crossbars and insulators, and several wooden platforms or walkways. Additional elements such as barrels, a well, and a few flat planks are arranged around the cabins, suggesting a rural or frontier setting. The cabins have small, square windows and single doors, with one building slightly larger than the other. The wood appears weathered, giving the structures an aged, utilitarian look. The overall composition evokes a self-sufficient homestead or outpost, suitable for a remote or edge-of-town urban context.
description: A rustic wooden cabin set with two gable-roofed buildings, a windmill, utility poles, and various wooden accessories, all featuring weathered wood textures and simple, functional forms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two main cabins, windmill, utility poles, barrels, and wooden walkways, with clear visibility of doors and windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the cabin walls, the profile of the windmill, and the alignment of the utility poles and planks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the cabins, the windmill's structure, and the arrangement of platforms and barrels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the windmill's ladder, the side profiles of the cabins, and the linear arrangement of the utility poles and planks.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, constructed from wooden planks, no visible overhangs or dormers
attribute_window_arrangement: multiple small, square windows asymmetrically distributed on the front and side facades of the cabins, with no clear pattern or grouping
attribute_door_placement: single doors centered on the front facades of both cabins, with no visible side or rear entrances
